This article about [renewable energy](/wiki/Renewable_energy "Renewable energy") plants is a [stub](/wiki/Wikipedia:Stub "Wikipedia:Stub"). You can help Wikipedia by [adding missing information](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Opatov_Photovoltaics_Plant&action=edit).

([Czech](/wiki/Czech_language "Czech language"): *Fotovoltaická elektrárna Opatov*) is a [photovoltaic power station](/wiki/Photovoltaic_power_station "Photovoltaic power station") in the [Czech Republic](/wiki/Czech_Republic "Czech Republic") commissioned in 2006. The plant is located in [Opatov](/wiki/Opatov_(Svitavy_District) "Opatov (Svitavy District)"), [Svitavy District](/wiki/Svitavy_District "Svitavy District"). It has an installed capacity of 60 [kW](/wiki/KW "KW"). It was shortly the largest photovoltaic plant in the country.[[1]](#cite_note-1)
[First Solar Power Plant Opens in Czech Republic](https://www.renewableenergyworld.com/2006/07/21/first-solar-power-plant-opens-in-czech-republic-45502/#gref)

first_paragraph: Photovoltaic power station in the Czech Republic

The **Opatov Photovoltaics Plant** ([Czech](/wiki/Czech_language "Czech language"): *Fotovoltaická elektrárna Opatov*) is a [photovoltaic power station](/wiki/Photovoltaic_power_station "Photovoltaic power station") in the [Czech Republic](/wiki/Czech_Republic "Czech Republic") commissioned in 2006. The plant is located in [Opatov](/wiki/Opatov_(Svitavy_District) "Opatov (Svitavy District)"), [Svitavy District](/wiki/Svitavy_District "Svitavy District"). It has an installed capacity of 60 [kW](/wiki/KW "KW"). It was shortly the largest photovoltaic plant in the country.[[1]](#cite_note-1)
